data.title: BONK Leads Memecoin Amid Crypto Rally While the Token Approaches 1M Holder Milestone
data.description:
• BONK has surged more than 8% in the last 24 hours, leading the altcoin rally as bitcoin hovers near fresh highs.
  • Tuttle Capital Management confirmed July 16 as the earliest possible launch date for its suite of leveraged crypto ETFs, including a 2X BONK ETF.
  • BONK is approaching the 1 million holders milestone, which will trigger a 1 trillion token burn event, potentially creating positive price pressure.

data.title: NEAR Protocol Surges 10% Before Profit-Taking Halts Rally
data.description:
• NEAR token surged 9.77% from $2.15 to $2.36 between July 2-3, breaking through the $2.30 resistance level with strong volume confirmation.
  • Profit-taking emerged after reaching the new high, with price retracing to $2.27 by session close, finding support at the 23.6% Fibonacci retracement level.
  • NEAR rose on Wednesday after fund manager Bitwise announced the launch of a NEAR exchange-traded product (ETP) in Germany.

data.title: ATOM Consolidates as Bitcoin Takes Driving Seat, Finds Support at $4.20
data.description:
• While Bitcoin neared record highs, altcoins like ATOM consolidated, finding key support at $4.20 as broader attention stayed on major crypto assets.
  • ATOM traded in a tight 4% range, showing signs of stabilization near $4.21 after a sharp intraday selloff, potentially setting up for a move if Bitcoin cools.
  • The CD20 Index surged 2% to a peak of $1,811.11 before pulling back on profit-taking, reflecting strong but temporary altcoin momentum.

data.title: The Open Platform Becomes First TON Unicorn Following $28.5M Raise
data.description:
• The Open Platform raised $28.5 million at a $1 billion valuation in an extended Series A fundraising.
  • The funding round was led by Ribbit Capital, with participation from Pantera Capital.
  • The company said it has become the first unicorn in the TON ecosystem.

data.title: Tether to Mine Bitcoin With Adecoagro in Brazil Using Surplus Renewable Energy
data.description:
• Tether is partnering with Adecoagro in Brazil to explore renewable energy-powered bitcoin mining.
  • Adecoagro, in which Tether holds a 70% stake, is a major food producer and has significant power generation capacity across South America.
  • Tether aims to become the largest bitcoin miner by the end of the year and has invested $2 billion in energy and mining operations, CEO Paolo Ardoino said in May.

data.title: Traders Pile on Short Positions as Bitcoin Approaches Record High
data.description:
• Despite bitcoin trading above $110,000 and nearing a new all-time high, traders are showing bearish sentiment, with the long/short ratio dropping significantly.
  • Rising short open interest from $32 billion to $35 billion suggests increased capital flowing into bearish positions, reflecting a lack of confidence in sustained upside.
  • For the time being, bitcoin remains range-bound between $100,000 and $110,000, with technical indicators like RSI signaling bearish divergence and traders exploiting this range through short-term strategies.

data.title: PEPE Climbs 10% as Golden Cross Signals Possible Further Gains in Hot Memecoin Market
data.description:
• PEPE surged 10% in 24 hours to as high as $0.00001049, driven by a golden cross technical pattern that suggests sustained bullish momentum.
  • The rally was accompanied by a significant spike in trading volume, with 13.7 trillion tokens traded in a single hour, and has established a strong support level near $0.0000101.
  • The token has outperformed the wider cryptocurrency market, with the CoinDesk 20 index rising 5.92% in the same period.

data.title: Filecoin Gains as Much as 9% Amid Wider Crypto Market Rally
data.description:
• FIL gained as much as 9% as crypto markets rallied.
  • The token has now formed strong support at the $2.40 level.
  • Filecoin is holding an informal networking evening on July 3 in Cannes.

data.title: Abu Dhabi Ventures Into Bond Tokenization with HSBC and FAB as RWA Momentum Accelerates
data.description:
• The Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange is set to list the first blockchain-based bond in the region, issued by First Abu Dhabi Bank using HSBC's digital asset platform Orion.
  • The initiative is part of Abu Dhabi's strategy to lead in the tokenization of real-world assets, a market projected to grow significantly in the coming years.

data.title: U.S. Added 147K Jobs in June, Topping 110K Forecast; Unemployment Rate Unexpectedly Falls to 4.1%
data.description:
• U.S. nonfarm payrolls increase by 147,000 in June, easily topping forecasts for 110,000.
  • The unemployment rate fell to 4.1% against expectations for an increase to 4.3%.
  • Bitcoin dipped a bit to $109,500 immediately following the data.
